notes.enabled: Set to true to enable S3 storage for reports
notes.bucket_name: Your S3 bucket name (must be globally unique)
notes.region: AWS region where bucket is located (e.g., us-east-1, eu-west-1)
notes.auto_cleanup_local: Delete local files after successful S3 upload
notes.presigned_url_expiry_seconds: How long presigned URLs remain valid (default: 7 days)
notes.use_environment_variables: If true, reads AWS credentials from environment (recommended)
notes.access_key_id: AWS Access Key ID (leave empty if using environment variables)
notes.secret_access_key: AWS Secret Access Key (leave empty if using environment variables)
